verses.text: Israel mite aw, note hong hopihna Topa' kammal ngai dih un
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Gamdangte' omdan ciing kei un la, vantunga lim lamdangte lunghihmawhna-in ngaihsun kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamdang mite in tuate a lunghihmawhpih uh hi
Hih mite' ngeinate a kiman'na omlo hi. Gamlakah sing khat kiphuk a, khutsiampa in a hei tawh milimin a bawl hi
Mite in tua pen kham leh ngun tawh zem uh a, a kilakkhiat theihlohna dingin sik tawh a kilh uh hi

A milimte uh, tangmai huanah vasate' launa dingin a kikhai milimte tawh kibangin pau theilo uh a, lam pai theilo uh ahih manin puak a kul hi. Tuate kihta kei un; siatna bawl theilo uh a, phatna zong bangmah bawl theilo uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa aw, nang tawh a kibang kuamah omlo hi. Nang na lian a, na min vanglian mahmah hi

Gam khempeuhte' Kumpipa aw, nang a hong kihtalo ding kua om ahi hiam? Nang, kihtak ding mah na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mipil khempeuhte leh amau' gamsung khempeuh lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah omlo hi
A mipilte uh mihai mimawl ahi uh hi. Sing milim in amaute bangci-in hilh thei mah ding ahi hiam
Tarshish khua panin ngun seksa va la uh a, Ufaz khua panin kham va la uh hi. Khutsiamte leh kham seekte in milimin bawl uh a, siamgat siamte' gat ahi, puan engdup leh puan sandup tawh a zem uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa pen Pasian man hi a, amah pen a nungta Pasian leh tawntung kumpipa ahi hi. A heh ciangin lei kiling a, gamte in a hehna nang zolo hi
Amaute' tungah, “Vantungte leh leitung a bawllo pasian-te, leitung mun khempeuh panin a mangthang ding uh hi,” ci-in na gen ding hi
Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh leitung bawl a, ama pilna tawh leitung piangsakin, ama siamna tawh vantung a zal hi
Amah a pau ciangin vantungah tuite ging hunhun a, leimong panin tuikhu a suaksak hi. Guahzukna dingin khua phiasak a, huihkua panin huih a nungsak hi
Mi khempeuh hai-in pilna neilo khin uh a, kham seekte khempeuh in a milimte uh a maizumlawh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a milimte uh zuau hi lel a, nak theilo uh hi
Kiman'na a neilo, a haihuaipi hi a, gim a kipiak ni ciangin a kisia ding uh hi
Jakob' Pasian tua bang hilo a, amah pen na khempeuh a piangsakpa ahi hi. Ama mi dingin Israel mite teel a, ama min, Vanglian Topa ahi hi.
Galte' umcih a thuak mite aw, na puanlom uh zial un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “En un, tu-in hih gamsungah a teng mite ka lawnkhia ding a, a theihna dingun a tung uhah lungkhamna ka tungsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Ka thuakna hangin ka gim a, ka liamna nasia mahmah hi. Ahih hangin, “Hih gimna ka thuak ding mah hi,” ka ci hi

Ka puanbuk hong kisuksiat sak a, a kikan'na khau khempeuh kitat mangkhin hi. Ka tate in hong taisan uh a, tu-in om nawnlo uh hi. Ka puanbuk a hong lamsak ding leh ka kongkhak puante a hong khaisak ding kuamah om nawnlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh makaite hai khin uh a, Topa' deihna donglo uh hi. Tua thu hangin amaute mapailo uh a, a mite uh kithehthang mang hi
Ngai dih un, thu khat kigen hi. Judah khuapite gamlak a suaksak ding leh se-alte' khua a suaksak dingin leilu lam gam panin buaina lianpi khat hong pai hi
Topa aw, mihing' omdan ama uk theih ahih lohna ka theita a, ama kalsuanna ding ama geeltheih hilo hi
Topa aw, a hoihbek takin, hehlua loin kei hong hilh in. Hong hehlua lecin kei ka si ding hi
Nangmah a hong theilo gamte tung leh nangma min a hong lo ngeilo mite tungah na hehna sungsuk in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jakob' suanlekhakte thatmang khinin amau' ten'na a susia khin uh hi.
